title: The Raid on Onigashima Begins
description: On pages 5–10, this part focuses on Law, Unknown person #5, Kinemon, Unknown person #6, Kaido, Straw Hat Pirates as The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
scene: The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: First of all! Let's assume the enemy is aware of the raid...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The ones they want to eliminate are you, the Red Scabbards!!

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: Alongside me, straw hat-ya and Eustass.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Certainly.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No matter which course of action we opt for...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: There'll always be two idiots...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who will charge in through the front!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Two idiots?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: These GOOD-FOR NOTHINGS WILL MAKE FOR A GOOD DIVERSION!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And so, we can make the troops ad- Vance on the both side as planned.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: However, they will be bait too!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We fully understand that this is a battle...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: meant to send kin' and the others to where they need to be, but...

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: What will the Red Scabbards do???!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: They'll Traverse by sea!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we go around the island using the submarine...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll be able to avoid the whirlpools that usually prevent any other landing.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can then send all of you onto the island using my ability.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hmm, that is very kind of you, law-dono, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's neces- sary for me to lead our main troops.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Indeed...! We shall take the mountain route then...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: One for the right and another for the left!! Take the rest with you!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: got it. We'll hit Kaido...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: With every thing we have!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Good! Good! Just as we planned from the beginning, the plan is now set in stone!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I expected nothing less of you, kin'- Emon. Truly a genius at devising stratagems!!

dialogue.speaker: Straw Hat Pirates
dialogue.text: Oi, the straw hats' ship ain't here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Remember someone

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: AAAA!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: An explosion in the mist?!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Was that Luffy-Dono's voice just now?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: OH NO!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I still haven't warned you about the guardians of the gate!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The gate in front of the island is a small fortress in its own right...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Whaaat?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If they were to realize that the raid is happening, then...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: That's bad!! We wouldn't stand a chance!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Luffy-Do Nooooo!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Shit. Did they get them?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Well done guys!! Good job!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Not too shabby!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We're Off to a smooth start!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The next time I

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Sneemne, I guess I'll

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What the heck is that gate?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: All those weapons!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If they had aimed at us with that....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hmm?

summary: This section advances the Wano - Raid on Onigashima Begins storyline with 50 dialogue beats. The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
